scripts.stack: concurrently -n "VERIFIER,GATEWAY,WEB" -c "red,cyan,green" "cd verifier && cargo run" "cd gateway && RECEIPT_STORE=${RECEIPT_STORE:-memory} CACHE_ENABLED=${CACHE_ENABLED:-false} go run ." "cd web && bun run dev"
scripts.test:unit: cd gateway && go test ./... && cd ../verifier && cargo test
